comment: Hand-authored ground truth for the demo transcript. Tests compare the generated capsule against this file; the generated/ directory itself is produced by shipping code, never by hand.
objective: Harden the acme-widgets service for the beta cut.
active_decisions:
Host the beta on a dedicated small cluster, because noisy neighbors
on acme-platform caused the March latency incident.
superseded_decisions: Host the beta on the shared acme-platform cluster.
contested_decisions: Adopt a weekly release cadence for the beta period.
unverified_decisions: Product reportedly wants SSO before beta; unconfirmed hearsay.
failed_approaches:
Caching whole responses in Redis; cache invalidation bugs
produced stale order totals in checkout and the approach was abandoned.
next_action: Run `pytest -q tests/store` and fix the first failure before touching the dashboard work.
must_survive_exact: Deploy to staging only with `make deploy ENV=staging TAG=beta`.
Keep p95 read latency under 250 ms at 400 rps.
Stop the rollout if error rate exceeds 0.5% for 10 consecutive minutes.
must_not_render_as_current: Host the beta on the shared acme-platform cluster.
